title: REDUX | 3D
description: An addon for Redux that adds 3D elements to blocks
body:
An addon for the larger pack Redux, adding 3D elements to rails, ladders, stonecutters and more!
![display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8874c5b95c013bc178e74e7ee73b41dc14d62c0d.png)
This pack is an ADDON of the original pack and is dependent on it to work, please make sure you have both packs selected, and in the correct selected order to avoid issues.

EXAMPLE PACK ORDER: ![pack order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0819fbd01f2414f5d3c6704d0a9ed8dc71fe540c.png)
